script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e

# 1. Fix PG_URL with actual password
PG_PASS=$(docker inspect n8n-postgres-1 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | grep POSTGRES_PASSWORD | cut -d= -f2-)
echo "PG password length: ${#PG_PASS}"

# Replace PG_URL in claude.env
sed -i '/^PG_URL=/d' /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env
echo "PG_URL=postgresql://n8n:${PG_PASS}@127.0.0.1:5432/vector_memory" >> /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env
echo 'PG_URL fixed'

# 2. Load env and test
set -a
source /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env
set +a

echo "New PG_URL length: ${#PG_URL}"

cd /opt/claude-code/workspace/agentic-rag/.claude/mcp/vector-server

# 3. Health
echo '=== Health check ==='
node -e "import('./db.js').then(m => { const db = new m.VectorDB({pgUrl: process.env.PG_URL, openaiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY}); db.health().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); process.exit(1); }); })" 2>&1

# 4. Store
echo '=== Store test ==='
node -e "import('./db.js').then(m => { const db = new m.VectorDB({pgUrl: process.env.PG_URL, openaiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY}); db.store({content: 'Кухни на заказ в Красноярске - замер бесплатно', layer: 'context', metadata: {source: 'smoke-test'}}).then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); process.exit(1); }); })" 2>&1

# 5. Search
echo '=== Search test ==='
node -e "import('./db.js').then(m => { const db = new m.VectorDB({pgUrl: process.env.PG_URL, openaiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY}); db.search({query: 'кухни Красноярск', limit: 3}).then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); process.exit(1); }); })" 2>&1

# 6. Stats
echo '=== Stats ==='
node -e "import('./db.js').then(m => { const db = new m.VectorDB({pgUrl: process.env.PG_URL, openaiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY}); db.stats().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); process.exit(1); }); })" 2>&1

echo 'ALL DONE'
intent: fix PG_URL password + full e2e test (health, store, search, stats)
